# Source Mapping

Every generated shader must start with a provenance header.

```text
// Generated by HoNprShaderGenerator.
// SourcePreset: MaterialPreset.Character_Toon_Core
// Template: Character/CharacterForward.template
// Blocks: BaseColorTexture, NormalMap, ToonDiffuseRamp, AovOutputStandard
// Manifest: ShaderSystem/GeneratedManifests/Character_Toon_Core.generated.md
// Do not edit generated body by hand. Edit template/block/preset instead.
```

Generated bodies should also add short section comments before template slots:

```text
// <HoNpr:Block MaterialBlock.ToonDiffuseRamp>
...
// </HoNpr:Block MaterialBlock.ToonDiffuseRamp>
```
